text.title: Methodologies Index Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable input signals onto a conclusion that references a rule id from 01-core-rules.xml.

conclusion.verdict: slot into existing group or create a new one if <8

example.trace: change=add_methodology -> slot into market-sizing -> alpha sort -> count bumped -> validator passes.

text.example: Worked path from root-question to conclusion.
